issues.title: Parameter Cd lacks explicit unit attribute
issues.detail: The parameter Cd is dimensionless, but its declaration does not include an explicit unit="1" attribute. While the comment indicates 'dimensionless', adding the unit attribute enhances clarity and aligns with Modelica best practices for unit consistency.

issues.title: Redundant event for non-negative protection
issues.detail: The model includes a 'when' clause to reinitialize h to 0 when h <= 0. This may be redundant because the calculations for Q_out and v_out already use max(h,0) for non-negative protection as required. The event does not affect correctness but could introduce unnecessary discrete events if triggered.

recommendations: Consider adding explicit unit="1" to the Cd parameter for consistency with Modelica unit conventions.
Review the 'when' clause for non-negative protection; it might be simplified or removed since max(h,0) already ensures robustness.
Add more detailed model documentation or comments to describe the physical assumptions and equations used.
考虑在代码中添加注释，解释使用 max(h, 0) 和 when 事件进行非负边界保护的工程理由，以增强可读性。
虽然仿真成功，但非负保护逻辑（max(h, 0) 和 when 事件）可能冗余；如果仅使用 max(h, 0) 已足够，可简化模型以提高效率。
